review_text: We had to find a place to stay while finding a rental on Phillip Island. We stayed at Anchor Belle and wouldnt stay anywhere else now. Nothing was ever too much for the friendly staff. A lovely, clean and prganised place to stay. Loved it.

Great location, fantastic staff, friendly atmosphere and amenities are very clean. Our van site was a good size and everything within easy reach. A park that goes to so much effort to reward children for joining in their activities. Easter staff is great fun for kids!
Happy to recommend. Modern, clean cabin. Friendly staff. Will definitely be going back.
Awesome caravan park

We had a really pleasant stay here at anchor Belle holiday park. The procedures for the check-in were very smooth and quick.
The facilities (a little bit old) were extremely clean; we are traveling with a rent van and we stayed in few camper sites and I found anchor bell park the cleanest!! Good job thanks for taking care of your guests!!
I’ve also used the laundry, good machines in general (I would suggest only to put the possibility to pay with card or to pay with card in exchange of coins).
We used the camp kitchen as well, very comfortable and very very clean!!
The locations is very near almost all the famous beach and also the penguin parade!
We absolutely recommend stay here!!

A great holiday park for a visit to Phillip Island.  Ideal location for exploring.  We stayed in a campervan and the sites were well sized and not too close together.  Toilets and showers were always clean, showers were powerful and held their temperature.  Camp kitchen was well equipped and clean.  Staff at reception were very friendly and recommended some places to visit on the island.  A great stay!
Caravan sites far too HARD  to get into , definitely wouldn't stay again

Great Caravan Park, large sites, can be a little tight to get onto site when park is busy. Amenities are great, and very clean. Staff were also fantastic and helpful. Park is dog friendly and close to a dog on leash beach.

From the moment we checked in we felt welcome. Friendly knowledgeable and helpful staff 🙂. Although some sites could be tight for bigger vans it is well laid out. The near me ablution block is awesome. Also told they have plans to replace the pool. I enjoyed the indoor pool as it was tempered but the new pool area is exciting for them and future travelers. Easy 5min walk to the beach. Another awesome G'Day park enjoyed by these Kiwi and Aussie travelers.
Great stay

We stayed here with our caravan on a ensuite site thu to Sunday and found the whole  place really well run...from the office staff to the maintenance crew...the sites are well maintained...the ensuites are immaculate..the only thing I hated was having to leave to go home...im not sure who the gentleman in the office is but your service is very professional...I recommend anchor belle to anyone who wants perfection at a very reasonable price...save even more by joining g'day parks which they are a member of...and for what its worth while we were there there were little rabbits happily running around mainly at sunset...it was truly a beautiful experience...so yes I'll be back as long as they have vacancies when I go back to cowes (phillip island)  p.s. don't forget to watch the penguins coming in at night..anchor belle is only about 10 mins up the road from the penguins...I've been to other caravan parks in our travels and your park is up there with the best in Victoria.well done anchor belle.

Stayed here for 10 nights in Family Cabin 2 within February 2025. The cabin was reasonably sized for the three of us, each of us had our own room. All of us stayed here for the first time ever (the booking is under a different name however I am another cabin member of the group I was with)

The cabin was clean and had a very warm blanket which is perfect for winter. Summer time wise meant that we had a good modern air conditioner for the main room with a ceiling fan. The master had a ceiling fan too but the rest of the rooms had no cooling (this is because the cabin didn't come with it when it was built, fair). I do wish they had some pedestal fans out there in the cabins though I could bring one next time if I booked for a cabin myself. Was able to sleep well most nights and those nights I didn't sleep well was because of my own doing (nothing to do with the mattress, it was good knowing it was a caravan park).

The wifi while understanding it is normal for a caravan park was quite bad (free wifi with unlimited vouchers that last 7 days at a time for maximum 750mb). Don't bother paying extra for wifi, you're just getting more data. Just get more vouchers.

The staff are really nice and the grounds people are very proactive and excellent in resolving issues like removing a dangerous basketball hoop which understandably last Saturday the hoop they already ordered had arrived as promised. They also fixed up a pipe near the recreation room before it rained during my stay which meant the site would have better flow of the rain. They also were happy to fix up our cabin door when it was super stiff.

They had a lap pool and toddler pool (wished they had a spa but not every place had to have one). They also had two camp kitchens which one of them was used way more often than the other. They had easy access to a fishing beach (not for swimming but nice for a walk or to fish if I had a rod)

Not far from town by car or bicycle (though we drove), had everything we needed. Enjoyed the stay where there is a mix of tourist attractions and the Smith Beach to drive down to.

The 5 stars goes to the excellent service, the other star ratings are basically just because of the business model which they chose to do because of being able to distinguish itself from others which can be love it or hate it for some, and the location is still very good knowing its in Cowes (not prime location however better location than the one and only hostel there is on the island)

This place is an older feel however not everyone wants some modernised camp (authentic camping place to be out in the bush getting that hot sun where I felt orange at times)

We just had 6 nights on a powered site.  Great location not too far from the main street area of Cowes. Our site was beautifully grassed and as corner site was spacious, however the sites are tight to get into and may catch a novice caranner off guard.

The facilities are great, nice clean new amenities block, indoor heated pool and usual jumping pillow games room to keep kids entertained. Two camp kitchens are present on site and are well equipped.

The park was lovely and quiet and appears to be home to many wild rabbits, we had baby bunnies on our site every day and they were very cute.

We were very happy with our Anchor Belle experience.

Staff were were very friendly and helpful with advice regarding local attractions on the island.

Highly recommended.
ruhig gelegen, gute Infrastruktur
Great location and service, clean and beautiful.
Great location, backed up with A grade staff

Wow!! This place is really unbelievable! We had a fantastic stay here! We stayed in one of the town houses and it was really unbelievable! A true home away from home. The location is also great, super close to the beach, not too far from down town Cowes, and pretty much a 10-15 minute drive to anything on the island. The grounds are super well taken care of with lots of recent additions. Pool was the perfect temperature, and we really loved the scavenger hunt! Staff were also super friendly. A fantastic place to stay! Thanks for making our time on Phillip Island so memorable!
Currently staying here and will be coming back lovely people and service and amenities and great

Great place to stay, we only stayed one night and got to enjoy a walk at the beach in the morning, bunnies all around the campground, nice and clean amenities.
+ great service and lovely help, would highly recommend.
Amazing venue, lots of things to do, clean modern facilities, cant wait for new pool!

I’ve been coming here for 5yrs and the experience keeps getting better. From the greeting to the good bye and everything in between is excellent, friendly faces, great advice and always a laugh. Love coming back.
The location is excellent, staff are friendly and very accommodating. The experiences offered during Australia Day were excellent. Thank you
Perfect location. Path to the beach. Staff always happy to help to make your stay the best. What more could you want.
Anchor Belle is a wonderful family caravan park. The staff are fantastic and the facilities are excellent, and just a very short walk to the beach.
Great site. Close to beach and town centre. Very clean and well maintained facilities. Great option for kids. Pool and play area.
Was a great park. Well maintained and clean. Friendly staff and family oriented.

This is our first stay here. Powered site. Overall our experience was good. My daughter made friends, loved the jumping pillow and indoor pool. Bathrooms were clean, kitchen was semi-equiped. I thought the kitchen could do with an oven and cook top (I thought there was a cook top pictured in the photos). There's a playground, but it's a littlies one. Short walk to beach. Coin laundry onsite. We camped during peak season with a lot of other families onsite, and found it to be pretty quiet considering. Espresso coffee available onsite, otherwise a short walk to Mr Islas cafe that opens at 5.30am for the early birds 🐦 (not me 😁😄). Considerate, friendly campers here, and friendly staff and regulars.

We stayed on a power sight, we felt we had enough room, had beach access and the facilities were clean and well managed. They had a games room, basketball court, a jumping pillow, playground and indoor pool as well as a scavanger hunt for the kids. Whether caravanning or in the cabins I would return it was a great week

Ticked all of the boxes. |*Adequate accommodation, we had a 2 bed cabin.|*Amazing, friendly staff. I felt like we were old friends.|*Enough activities to keep a 9 year old and 11 year old occupied, jumping pillow, basketball court, pool tables, arcade games and more.|*Walking distance from the beach|* Indoor heated pool|*Quiet and family friendly.

We have been coming to this caravan park for over 20 years now. The staff are amazing — always friendly, super accommodating, and happy to help with anything. Nothing ever seems like too much trouble, and they really make you feel welcome every time you stay.

The park is always clean and well looked after, which makes it easy to relax and enjoy your holiday. Over the years we’ve met so many long-term friends here, and it’s been great watching our kids grow up coming to the park and making their own friendships too.

There’s a real sense of community here that keeps us coming back year after year. It’s a special place with great people, great memories, and staff who genuinely care about their guests.

We have been coming to Anchor Belle for the past 15 years.
We absolutely love this park.  We love the location, facilities and most of all, the staff.
Amy and Brad in particular have always been so welcoming and accommodating.
Thank you for always giving us an amazing summer holiday.
Bec and Dave

Anchor belle holiday park is exceptional beyond belief! They have provided an incredible atmosphere for myself and my family with excellent service, amazing facilities and all round great vibes!
This is a perfect place for a family or just you and a mate.
The facilities here are incredible for children and adults with a heated pool, fully equiped games room, food trucks during busy seasons and hot showers!😍
Incredible, incredible, incredible, need I say more.

I’ve been coming to this holiday park since I was a baby and always look forward to coming back. It genuinely feels like a second home, and over the years I’ve made lifelong friends here and created so many great memories with family and family friends.
The staff are always friendly, welcoming, and respectful, which really adds to the overall experience. It’s a place that’s consistently comfortable and familiar, and that’s what keeps us coming back year after year.
I’d definitely recommend this holiday park to families or anyone looking for an easy, welcoming place to stay in Phillip Island.

We have been visiting this park for 22 years, travelling from Central Victoria, and it truly feels like a second home. Over the years we’ve made lifelong friends here — including among the staff — which says everything about the welcoming and inclusive atmosphere.

Life hasn’t always gone to plan, and on several occasions we’ve needed to change dates at short notice. Every time, Neil, Carol, and now Amy and Brad have shown genuine compassion and gone above and beyond to accommodate us. Even when it meant being in a different area of the park, everything is so close that it never mattered — we were always grateful to be looked after.

This park has hosted many special memories for us, from group dinners and cocktail nights to international food events. Staff have always handled reminders around noise or bedtime with respect and professionalism, striking the perfect balance of friendliness and firmness.

Now our adult children are booking their holidays to match ours and bringing their partners along, continuing the tradition. We look forward to many more years here and hope to one day share this special place with our grandchildren. Highly recommended — this park is truly something special. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

We have been coming to Anchorbelle Caravan Park for over 20 years, and it has truly become a home away from home for us. Every visit reinforces why we keep coming back. The atmosphere is always warm, welcoming, and inviting, making it the perfect place to relax and unwind. The park is consistently well maintained, and there’s a genuine sense of community that makes everyone feel at ease. We have always been extremely happy with our experiences here and have created so many wonderful memories over the years. Anchorbelle is a special place, and we highly recommend it to anyone looking for a friendly, comfortable, and enjoyable stay.

Every year, this park has provided an unforgettable holiday experience for both myself and my family. We have been coming here since I was just two years old, and as I have grown up, this holiday park has truly become a second home to us. It is a place filled with cherished memories from every stage of my life, and returning each year feels like coming back to somewhere familiar and comforting.

What makes this park so special is not only its location, but the people who work here. The staff are genuinely amazing and play a huge role in creating such a welcoming and enjoyable environment. Over the years, as we’ve grown older and occasionally tested the boundaries — including receiving a few noise complaints — the staff have always been incredible to work with. They handle every situation with professionalism, understanding, and respect, which has never gone unnoticed or unappreciated.

The team are consistently flexible, kind, and approachable. I can always walk into reception and have an open conversation with the staff about absolutely anything, whether it’s a question, a concern, or just a friendly chat. Their willingness to listen and support guests truly sets this park apart.

Even now, after moving to Wagga Wagga, NSW, I continue to make the trip down to this park because of the consistently amazing experience it provides. I genuinely couldn’t imagine staying anywhere else on the island. This holiday park holds a very special place in my heart, and it will always be my first choice for creating lasting family memories.

We booked a cabin for our visiting family from overseas and the staff have been absolutely fabulous! With suggestions on day trips to ongoing help and attentiveness. Nothing was too hard and they made our overseas family feel so welcome and at home. We were so happy with the park! We will be booking any time we have OS visitors in the future so they can enjoy the island as much as we do.

Not worth to visit this park at all
We stay previously was nice stay with family

But this time whoever was that at the receptionist not helping talk to solve the problems
Her gestures was not liking, shaking head from top of the reception office and bit of angrenes in word on first day of checking in

anyway will never come to this park and let my community group 2500 members will be inform about this

Thanks you
Good luck

Very disappointing experience at Anchor Belle Holiday Park.

We booked five tent sites for five different families, expecting a pleasant and relaxing holiday. Unfortunately, from the beginning of our stay, it was clear that the quality of service was very poor. None of the families were happy with the allocated sites, and our concerns were not taken seriously when raised.

The manager was rude, unprofessional, and completely unhelpful, and the overall attitude of the staff was disappointing. Instead of trying to assist or resolve issues, we felt dismissed and disrespected throughout our stay.

What made the experience even worse was the feeling that we were treated unfairly and experienced discrimination. This created a very uncomfortable and upsetting environment for our families and children and completely ruined what was meant to be an enjoyable holiday.

Due to the poor management, lack of respect, and unacceptable treatment, we would not recommend Anchor Belle Holiday Park to families looking for a welcoming, friendly, and respectful place to stay.
We will not be coming back again.

We had a very disappointing experience at Anchor Belle Holiday Park, mainly due to the behavior of the counter staff and management.
While we fully understood that the checkout time is 10:00 AM, the way this was handled was completely unacceptable. At 10:03 AM, we received a call demanding that we leave immediately, with no flexibility whatsoever, not even an extra 10 minutes. Packing up a tent naturally takes time, and the staff showed no understanding or basic courtesy.
The manager’s tone was extremely rude, aggressive, and disrespectful, which felt unprofessional and inappropriate. Instead of communicating politely, we were spoken to harshly and made to feel unwelcome.
Additionally, the site itself is very cramped. There is barely enough space to park a car and set up a tent together. It feels like the park is overcrowded, with too many bookings squeezed into a very small area.
What was most disappointing is that after 10:00 AM, children were not even allowed to use the facilities, and we were told to leave the premises immediately. This lack of flexibility and hospitality is unacceptable for a holiday park.
Overall, poor customer service, rude management, and overcrowded facilities made this a very unpleasant experience. We would not recommend this park to families or anyone expecting basic respect and reasonable treatment.

We booked here for one night close to Christms, and then stayed another!

Great location, walk along the beach to Cowes. Rooms were clean, large and recently updated!

See you next time

Loved this little caravan park. Cabins were clean and comfortable. The staff should run classes on how to deliver exceptional customer service, they were so lovely and helpful from the day we booked. Easy 5 min walk to the beach, really good kiosk and coffees. Really enjoyed our stay.

We have a twelve night stay which is coming to an end on Friday. We have been here over Christmas and will be here for New Year.
It's a great park. The staff are super friendly and helpful. The site we have is great 156. Although it's tight to get into there plenty of room to have your awning out and park your car down the side so it's not on the road.
There an indoor heated pool, games room, and a bouncy pillow great for the kids out of the way so nobody has to listen to the little darlings.
There are 2 amenity blocks ours was behind reception and looks quite new and always kept clean. Even during this busy time they are pretty good.
There are 2 camp kitchens one with a pizza oven, the other has plenty of tables outside.
They have had different food trucks here and an ice cream van. They have organized entertainment for new Year's Eve.
In the section we are in it's been really quiet although full.
It's about a half hour walk into the main town. I would definitely stay here again if I was in the area. The gate at the back gives easy access to the beach.

We arrived in a pickle!
Our original accommodation was a dump!
So we went to Anchor Belle in hope they would be able to assist us... and that they did!

Polite staff, clean facilities, a great location, and the cabin we stayed in was what some may call dated, but it was perfect and humble, it had everything we needed.

Only a 2 min drive from the main part of Cowes, but still felt far enough away when you retired for the night.

Thank you Anchor Belle for your hospitality and helping us out, we will return and will most definitely be recommending you to all who ask where to stay at Phillip Island.
Thank you you again.

We booked at another place with a pool, Melbourne weather decided to be cold so I kept my mum at the original place we booked and decided to book here so my daughter could have fun. This park is so child friendly and brought back memories of my family caravan park days, the vibe is just so beautiful.staff are all very friendly, rooms very clean. Pool was a great temp, games room. You are so close to the beach that I could smell the ocean! I can’t wait to come back! Thank you Anchor Belle hotel, what a winner!!! 🥇

Very quiet, clean and tidy caravan site + ensuite & close to the beach.
Highly recommend!

Excellent place.
Very friendly staff,  the amenities and grounds were spotless. We are definitely coming back.
We would give it 10 stars if we could

I requested a wheelchair accessible cabin and what I got was BRILLIANT . Ample reserved parking beside cabin, correct angle access ramp to front door , spacious hard floor living and kitchen area , generous main double bed room , 4 bunks in second room if required and spacious fully compliant bathroom  with roll in shower with fold up shower bench  , handrail near toilet , accessible hand basin
The cabin was spotlessly clean , quiet , and adjacent to walkway to beach.
So pleased to arrive after a long drive from Sydney , no compromises re accessible accommodation , unlike other places where I have been let down so many times

‏Anchor Belle Holiday Park – Phillip Island

‏5 Stars – Absolutely Outstanding!

‏We stayed at Anchor Belle Holiday Park in Cowes, Phillip Island, and the experience was nothing short of exceptional.
‏The park deserves every one of its five stars — and more.

‏From the moment we arrived, everything was immaculate:
‏	•	Spotless, well-organised grounds
‏	•	Modern and extremely clean amenities
‏	•	Beautiful new showers and restrooms
‏	•	Excellent dump point and well-maintained facilities
‏	•	Dog-friendly environment
‏	•	Drive-through sites with private en-suites that were unbelievably clean and perfectly set up
‏	•	Heated indoor pool
‏	•	A super clean camp kitchen (although we missed having a standard oven, the pizza oven was a fun alternative!)

‏We were a group of 16 Jayco Getaway Club caravans, and every single one of us enjoyed every moment of our stay.

‏The location is simply unbeatable — a short walk to the beach, peaceful surroundings, and visits from wildlife including kangaroos, rabbits, and even rare birds that made the stay truly memorable.

‏Anchor Belle is the kind of park that has everything you need, organised exactly the way you want it when you’re caravanning.

‏Highly recommended, and we’ll definitely be back!

Staff friendly and welcoming.
Good location

The staff were aggressive and unhelpful. Location is poor and the kids play facilities are old, untidily kept and dirty. I wouldn't use the rundown pool again for hygienic concerns. Stay anywhere else on Phillip Island
Great Caravan Park, close to town and the beach.
Spent a week here for MotoGp weekend, great location, excellent amenities great staff.

Fantastic park l was a solo female traveller felt very safe in the park.|Accommodation stayed vin a 2 bedroom unit very clean had everything you needed.|Staff were so pleasant and friendly to deal with, l will be back|Thankyou for a great stay

Nice park, visited in the middle of winter.
Close to shops & easy to access van sites.
Dog friendly too.
Ok

My husband and I have just spent 5 nights on a powered site, what a great park!!!
Very clean amenities, lovely maintained sites and amazing staff!!
Highly recommend a visit, great location, short walk to beach for beautiful sunsets!
Our only disappointment was the pool closure…… but it’s being renovated and will be even better in the future.
Thank you Amy and your great team.

Great spot for the family. Only negative is some of the internal roads aren’t great for scooters for the kids (as they are gravel) but there is plenty of the kids to do (jumping pillow, pool, games room, space to run/ride!!!)
Great time in the cabin for our family of four! Super clean and had all of the amentities we needed!

Stayed for 2 weeks in our caravan with my fiance and son. Would recommend anyone travelling through Cowes to stay in this great caravan park. Super friendly staff, very accomodating and generally nice people, the park is super kid friendly, great amenities, clean facilities and in a great location. Beach access from the park, a 15 minute walk up the road to the main ships. Highly recommend and will be staying here again in future! Thank you
Very well run caravan park lovely people

We stayed for a few nights in a powered ensuite site. Couldn’t be more impressed with the staff and facilities for kids. The staff are so wonderful and friendly and go above and beyond. We will be coming back in the warmer months. The kids were in paradise and didn’t want to leave the park with all the fun things to do. Highly recommend this fantastic place
indoor swimming pool, gaming room, neat and clean camp kitchen and bbq, good options for all accommodation. highly recommended.

We had a great family stay in Townhouse #1. We travelled the week before school holidays so it was blissfully quiet. We had the pool to ourselves every day. Although the pool is old it’s perfect for what it is. Was warm and the 4 kids aged between 6 and 15 loved it. The townhouse was perfect for our family. Beds very comfortable. Interest was great in the townhouse and served all our family well and we watched many movies together on the upstairs smart tv. Had a good sized kitchen and 2 toilets which was helpful. The balcony had a view of the ocean, albeit small, but we weren’t expecting that so it was a bonus. A very quick walk to be at the ocean and what’s handy in Cowes is Cole’s, Woolworths and Aldi are only a short drive away. The staff are very friendly and we’ll 100% visit again. We only stayed 4 nights and wish we stayed longer. Only only 15 minutes to the penguin parade and about 10 mins to the Chocolate factory. The fish and chips at Kim’s were awesome and they were also friendly and told us where we would likely find whales from the shore

We recently spent 3 nights in an ensuite caravan site. The ensuite was very clean and the park was very tidy and quiet.
The heated pool was an awesome bonus for the middle of winter which we had to ourselves.
The staff were pleasant and had the best personalities. Made the stay pleasant right from the start.

Good park. Would need to dive to main street cows but walking distance to the beach.
Caravan sites are wide but can be tricky getting in with the road being so narrow.
Some tight turns so slow and careful on the way in and out towing a caravan.

We had such a lovely relaxing time staying in a cabin here. The cabin was really clean and the whole park was so neat and well kept. The reception staff were so kind. They even gave us blankets to take to the Penguin Parade. There's a back gate leading down to the beach which was fantastic!!! The whole park was so peaceful. We really needed some time away and this was just what we needed. We will definitely be coming back.
Amenities very clean and tidy. Lovely front desk staff very helpful

We camped here and it’s been great, nice setup, lovely staff, clean and well maintained facilities
Thankyou!
Brad such a legend! Helped us with our car and jumped in as a mechanic just before Public Holiday. Very friendly and helpful, nice place, close to the beach, good facilities !
Anchor Belle Holiday Park is a great place to stay. Lovely staff. Very family friendly. Close to the beach and other sight seeing destinations. Highly recommend.

The staff are wonderful, always ready to help you with a smile. The park has everything you could want. The activities for the kids are terrific.  The beach within walking distance. Would never stay anywhere else on the island this is a great park.
Wonderful weekend and the staff are lovely and very helpful will be back again

Beautiful holiday park, accomodation had everything we needed in our  cabin.|Very quiet at night time so great nights sleep in bed that was so comfortable. Staff were very friendly also. Also has billiards, table tennis & pool.|Loved everything about this park.
Sensational park, so good for kids. Super helpful and friendly staff, great amenities and quick and easy access to the beach. Big grassed sites allowing for dogs to relax and great privacy.

Wir waren 4 Nächte dort. Es ist ein schöner Caravanplatz. Die Sanitäranlagen sind sauber und ordentlich. Zur Stadt ist es nicht weit und durchaus zu Fuß erreichbar (2 km). In der Nähe gibt es einen kleinen Imbiss mit leckeren Kaffee. Der Campingplatz ist ideal um die Insel zu besuchen.

I can’t sing its praises enough! Nestled in a perfect location, this holiday park provided the perfect getaway experience for my family and me.

We stayed in a modern 3-bedroom villa that felt just like a home away from home. The villa was immaculate, exceptionally clean, beautifully spacious and it was wonderfully priced—great value for every dollar spent!

Whether you’re traveling with kids or just seeking relaxation, this park covers it all. The pool & Basketball court in particular, were a standout feature. Our kids had a blast, and so did we.

The park itself is well-maintained, with extremely friendly staff who ensure every guest feels welcome and cared for. There's plenty to do in Phillip Island for people of all ages, from leisure activities to exploring nearby attractions.

In conclusion, I couldn’t recommend Anchor Belle Holiday Park highly enough. It’s a gem of a destination, combining comfort, outstanding facilities, and reasonable prices.

We had a wonderful stay at this caravan park. From the moment we arrived. The staff were incredibly friendly and welcoming making us feel right at home. The pet friendly atmosphere was a huge bonus allowing us to bring our fur baby  along for the adventure. The location was perfect close to all the amazing attractions  Phillip Island has to offer including the penguin parade, beautiful beaches and great local cafes. The park itself was well-maintained with clean facilities and a relaxed family friendly vibe. Highly recommend for anyone looking for a convenient pet friendly place to stay on Phillip Island.

Take our caravan to Ancho Bell each year for two weeks and love the park.  Great big sites and nice with lovely grass underfoot.   Facilities are clean and never have to wait for a shower. I find staff to be very friendly and always helpful

We had the best time at Anchor Bell. The caravan park is clean and well maintained. The owners and staff are so welcoming and friendly. The kids loved the jumping pillow and indoor pool. It’s a short walk to the pier and short drive to the Main Street. We stayed here over the Christmas/new year period and had a fantastic holiday. Thank you Anchor Bell Phillip Island.
The best place to go when travelling with kids.
Great pleace for family holiday. Highly recommend.

Absolutely amazing place!!! Shoutout to Kelli for her outstanding customer service and for saving my friend group. She went out of her way to get us a place to stay last minute as well as even giving us information about different places we could visit on our trip and providing us with all the necessary info. This was a great place with amazing staff, highly recommend checking it out.

I had such an amazing weekend away at Anchor Belle Holiday Park. The service was amazing and the staff were so lovely especially Kelly. They made the stay so welcoming and i will definitely be back again. I strongly recommend this place to anyone looking for a little getaway on phillip island.
Fantastic staff, our powered site was fantastic. Clean facilities. Family friendly. Highly recommend. Great location. Beach straight across the road. Jetty for fishing and a boat ramp!

We’ve been on the road for over 8 months and this park is one of the worst we’ve stayed in.
Packed in like sardines and the caravan site is dirt and gravel, overnight rain has left a mud bath outside our door on our site.  We asked admin staff if we could possibly move, as so many more vacant sites, they had zero interest and couldn’t care less. Still stuck here and have booked the other park, NRMA Cowes……who have been amazing and accommodating can’t wait to move there!
Do not recommend, once you’re here they couldn’t care less.
Rules, rules rules...too many rules. Be great to have an outdoor pool. Indoor pool steamy and stuffy

Amy at the Anchor Belle Holiday Park gave us a very warm welcome to Phillip Island. Our group of 23 loved the park’s facilities and our complimentary pack of wine, dips & biscuits. The camp kitchen had all the facilities we needed for a great stay. We’d purchased the Phillip Island 3 Parks Pass which was great value. Churchill Island was very interesting with its historical displays & activities & we loved the koalas and the evening penguin parade. Thank you Anchor Belle & Phillip Island for a wonderful stay.
Das ist der beste Camping auf unserer Reise. Die Mitarbeitenden sind unglaublich nett und hilfsbereit. Die Anlagen sind sehr sauber. Wir hatten eine tolle Zeit.
Great camping with amazing friendly staff. Best campground on Phillip Island
Awesome caravan park. Big sites and great staff

We had a power/ensuite site. Heaps of room for a large van and your car beside it with the awning out. Very clean and tidy park and staff are friendly and knowledgeable. Close to town and only a short walk to the beach.

We had a great time , fantastic value for money sites , great location right near the Cowes boat ramp through walk to the beach which is great to see wallabies and rabbits at dusk or have a fish.  There is in door pool large jumping pillow and games rooms. The sites are a good size and staff were fabulous and friendly.

Awesome Park to stay at, especially when the fambam go to the Motorbikes. Super clean all round from the Park itself, the Sites, Cabins & Bath/ Wash Rooms. Staff are super friendly & make a damn good coffee. Kids play areas, as well as a common room where you can play Pool, Air Hockey & Table Tennis. Indoor heated pool as well as a cool BBQ area. Never disappoints! 2min drive into town so you can collect supplies.
Very pleased with the site overall clean facilities well maintained grounds very helpful staff and good coffee and bacon and egg  rolls when available Cheers.

Surpassed our expectations!
Great for the kids as the games room is actually functional, as was the jumping pillow and indoor pool.  The indoor pool is GENUINELY WARM, which was delightful and draws the kids in.  The staff are very friendly.  The grounds are very well kept.  The bathrooms and showers are spotlessly clean!  Just a very short walk down a lovely bush path to get to a beautiful dog friendly beach with a small jetty for fishing.  And you can even get a nice bottle of wine from reception.
Too many boxes to tick here!

The only way this place could have scored any higher would be to have movies or a communal fire etc for the kids in the evenings, as only in the evenings were the kids ever short of activities.
Always a great yearly experience. Super busy on GF weekend.

Second time we have been... first in a cabin... then second in our caravan.

Awesome site, amenities are clean and immaculate. Heaps to do for the kids.
One of the best parks I have been to.
Great little caravan park. Clean and tidy. Staff (Kelli, Janine, Brad and Amy) were very welcoming and helpful. Can thoroughly recommend.
Kel, James and Janine fantastic hosts for our weekend away. Great facilities and the coffee was amazing. Thanks all and see you again soon
Great place to stay, minor issues to report which the staff were very concerned about.

Excellent customer service is not lacking here at Anchor Belle, I changed my booking, added an upgrade, asked lots of questions and was a little anxious with the first trip with van and dog!
Amy, Janine and Kelly were all fabulous and so helpful - they made my weekend... the grounds are wonderful , ensuite really clean and access to beach fabulous for the dog... a great weekend away - wouldn't hesitate to recommend.

The staff was sooo friendly and overall the campsite is amazing. However you do have to pay for most games in the games room and for tabletennis you have to purchase the ball, still there are good options for free.
Pool looked awesome and walk to the beach is short.

A lovely place to stay! The park was almost empty as it was after the school holidays and middle of winter. Staff were friendly and helpful to recommend local places to visit. Our accommodation was warm and had plenty for space for us to spread out. We were so delighted to see bunnies running around the grounds and lots of birds singing in the trees. A great place to stay.
We love visiting this park,  has plenty to do ever in winter! Close to shopping and dining and right on the beach.  Facilities are clean and tidy.
Very comfortable and clean cabins. Great pool and game facilities and good location.

What a wonderful place to stay. Cabins in immaculate clean condition . Park tidy and neat. So much for children to do, swimming pool , play ground , games room ect! Close to penguins , shops . Staff amazing kind helpful and friendly. We can’t wait to come back !!  Thank u for for us !!!!!!🩷

I had a short getaway here with just my 2 sons and I. The staff were super friendly and helpful, ensuring we were well looked after. It was located not too far from the main street with shops and cafes, the beach was a short stroll away too.
The cabin was clean and comfortable with main necessities.
We were lucky enough to be staying right near the jumping pillow, indoor pool, games and rec room. They had several camp kitchens which looked great too.
Would like to stay again another time for sure.

Our family stayed for a winter getaway and the kids absolutely love it - the pool, pillow, games room and family feel are a hit. Cabin was super clean and had everything we needed. This was our second time and did not disappoint. Thankyou

Last minute getaway for the Kings Birthday long weekend. Front desk was super helpful when I emailed in asking for availability and also over the phone. Cabin 5 next to the playground was great, facilities kept in great condition, our cabin was very clean when walking in on our first day which is always nice! No dust or disgusting old smells, ran my finger across most surfaces and very tidy. Park kitchen in immaculate condition well kept and clean, nice sitting areas. Close to everything and the kiosk coffee was very good! Only feedback would be the pool and games room area is a little outdated but wouldn’t take much to update. We’ll be back, cheers
Nice place to stay. Is slightly run down and could do with a refurb but if your not picky it's a pretty cool place to stay.
We had a site not cabin

What a massive relief; Booked ensuite site at short notice after coming from another park that didn't even have a functional camp kitchen, this has two, and an heated indoor pool, jumping castle, immaculate sites and well thought out and beautifully clean ensuites. Even have the attention to detail to put eye bolts in the concrete for awning ropes.
Staff excellent, very clear instructions on arrival. Must go down to office in morning and book another night or two.
Very slight slope on site, allows us to park nose up hill a tiny bit, making for a better night sleep in the 6x6.
Also seems to work well for drainage as site not waterlogged. Almost had to winch out of last park we stayed at. Excuse me while I go enjoy a real shower for the first time on the trip.

This was our second stay at Anchor Belle and it didn't disappoint again.  It is one of the cleanest and well maintained parks we have stayed in.  The staff are super friendly and very helpful.  It is only a short walk to the beach and located in a quiet part of Cowes.  Dog friendly too which is an added bonus.  I highly recommend staying here.

We stayed in one of the 2 bedroom cabins and were able to be alongside 2 other families in side-by-side cabins.  Our experience at Anchor Belle was just wonderful.  The cabins themselves are very clean and have everything you need to cook your own meals.  I have been to many caravan parks and stayed in cabins and some feel dirty or unkempt.  You can tell the staff at Anchor Belle take pride in their work as the cabins were so beautifully clean, I felt very comfortable having my young family stay there.
The facilities were equally great.  The whole family loved the pool (which was pleasantly warm for April) as well as the games rooms and jumping pillow.  The staff were super friendly and helpful.
The location of the caravan park itself was perfect. Close to the main shops of Phillip Island and a short walk away from quiet beaches.
We will definitely be staying again!

The BEST family experience. 8 adults & 8 children over three days ✨ bliss!

And finding sweet rocks all over the place!

See you in September!

We have been staying annually at Anchor Belle for years now, and have always had an enjoyable experience. We usually get an ensuite site, and it's always been clean and tidy.||I like being able to walk to the beach from the park, and it's not too far to the main street. It's a short bike ride.||My grandchildren enjoy the indoor pool, the jumping pillow, and the games.||The laundry facilities are good. Just be sure to bring $2 coins when you go!||We look forward to our next visit, and hope next time to bring our dogs with us.|Axella Johannesson and Martin Taylor

Great facilities & exceptional  location - less than 5 minutes walk to the beach. | Unbelievably friendly & accommodating staff with a gorgeous dog. |Pool, jumping pillow & 2 x games rooms were a huge hit with the kids, as was the basketball court.

We had a powered site over the weekend and we had such a great time. The amenities were clean, the park is safe for kids. There is plenty to occupy young kids. The staff were friendly and helpful. And the beach was so close! A great option and will definitely return!
Lovely park. Plenty of green lawn. Nice plants. Clean and tidy.

The cabin was clean and well equipped. I thoroughly enjoyed my 4 day stay. The park has everything that a family could need. Playground, pool (including a toddler pool), jumping mat and access to the beach. I will definitely be back both on my own and with my family.

$15 per child is a joke, seriously guys the cost for camping is already ridiculous without this added fee. Pool was nice, though would be quite small with busy time of year. Sites were tiny and trees brushing up against the van. Can see why more and more people are illegal/stealth camping.
Nobody told us that our site would be next to the pizza trailer. They had a 11000 watts generator running 2 meters away from our site. The noise was terrible.
Friendly staff, from booking to arrival and departure. Great experience. Park was also clean and a great family vibe. Looking forward to staying there again!

Average Gday park. Old school amenities. Mostly permanent sites.  Walk to beach. 2klms from town.  Checked out today, 2 days early, disappointed we were allocated site 81 next to park entrance and exit boom gate, small site, sloped, uneven.  Poor management when park was mostly empty. This would be the last place i would locate some campers next to park entrace and exit boom gate.  (High vehicle traffic area) how is anyone expected to relax.

I will not be back, I would stay at NRMA foreshore park that is right on the beach and 1klm from town

Also no hand washing soap in camp kitchen
* Park manager wanted to charge for 4 nights for my kids when we only stayed 2 nights

We had a group of 24 camper trailers here. Everyone was very happy with the customer service. Amenities a bit outdated but still very operational and well maintained and clean. Keep it up Anchor Belle. We will be back 👍👏🏻

Lovely park with lovely staff. Great location within walking distance to a very safe beach on the bay. It’s away from the hustle and bustle but walking distance to the shops. Recommend the sunset cruise and the golf course is great. Thank you for a lovely relaxing stay.

The staff are friendly and fantastic to deal with.  The park is well laid out and  the lower area where we stayed had plenty of shade.  The amenities are very clean and very well maintained.  The beach is a short walk  from the park.  We stayed five nights and we will be returning as there is plenty to do at Phillip Island.
Just amazing loved the place plenty to do

💯 For the children.
Super clean and spacious amenities.
Great park for school holidays and spending time in the park
Had a great time with the family here, highly recommend.
Lovely quieter Park.. good security..walk to beach..a bit further out of town
Nice
Boring and signaless
Had our schoolies here, staff were very nice, friendly and allowed us to celebrate here

We booked a powered site for our camper  large site. Plenty of room for van, car and kids to play. Lovely grassy well maintained site. Booked this caravan park due to indoor pool. Everything very clean and tidy. Staff seen constantly maintaining gardens. Very friendly

Kelly and Amy were absolutely amazing. Kelly went out of her way to assist me booking a same day cabin for us. Amy kept us inform pf the status of the cabin when i rang to make payment. Both whad fantastic customer service skills.The park was awesome. We were in a cabin opposite the playground which was prefect as we have a 4 year old and could watch her from the balcony. The beach access was great. The park was extremely clean. Highly recommend it.
Uncontrolled children, trying to hitch up caravan and kids riding bikes in front of us, parent watching with no concern.
I highly recommend Antaaraa Spa to anyone in need of a spa in Lucknow. The ambiance and service are both exceptional

We were there with a caravan. Lots are really spacious and grassy. Amenities a bit old but really very well  maintained. You enter any  time of the day it is spotless. Well done and we will come back to this wonderful park.
Caravan park is great with terrific amenities
Lovely park people running park so helpful and friendly lots to do for kids our grandkids came for the day and had a ball will defo be returning to this park
Lots of fun for the kids

Stayed at this place 3 nights
Absolutely beautiful place for the  kids to be at
Lots of things to do for the kids

Service was really good friendly
Cabin we’re clean really nice quite spacious shops beach not far

Pool was clean kids enjoyed it

Would come back here for the children

Absolutely amazing park, we tried 6 parks down the Mornington peninsula for a first trip with our new van. None answered, anchor belle was the only place we found. Great price and great park, ladies in the office are the best I have ever dealt with, us and and bunch of other friends have rebooked another trip next year and I can not wait love this park
Such a great park! Really enjoy coming here.  Great for the kids, close to beaches
clean and nice place to stay we whole family all enjoy there
We stayed last year in our carvan and were so happy with everything. The ladies in the office were just so lovely too! Looking into our next stay now :)
My daughter's school work bottom two paragraphs are the best review for you guys 🤣
Super friendly staff, good facilities and reasonably priced. Will be back!
Very accommating
